title: Hallowed Fantasy Cobblemon
description:
Modpack for the Hallowed Fantasy: Cobblemon server

Custom regional forms, an intense gym challenge, a complete PokeDex, and more await!
body:
Hallowed Fantasy Cobblemon: Public release!

Welcome to the Fantasy Region, a land full of Fantasy-regional form Pokemon, intense battles, and stuff to explore!

Our server features Terralith biomes, Incendium Nether, & Nullscape End!

Features you can find on our server:
- All Legendaries spawning in the wild
- Raids available for most Pokemon, ranging from Caterpie to Paradox Legendaries
- Completely P2W (pay to win) free. All non-cosmetic items available through gameplay
- Unique Trainer Levels system! Earn rewards for catching, hatching, and defeating wild Pokemon
- 8 NPC Gyms of varying difficulty
- 8 Player-run dual-typed Gyms
- 8 custom towns in our Fantasy Region
- Player World with Land Claim to prevent griefing
- Monthly-resetting Resource World to obtain resources
- Almost every Pokemon has a model, including ones not in base Cobblemon
- Mega Evolutions!
- Dynamax!
- Terrastralization!

Below is a list of mods used in our Modpack:
- [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
- [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/en)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)

Shader Pack:
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

Resource Pack:
- [XaerosCobblemon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xaeroscobblemon)
